column1: # STDSEED TSV manifest — VistA fixture seed-data.
# Lines beginning with '#' are comments. Blank lines are skipped.
# Each row dispatches once via `filer` — default `fileViaDie^STDSEED`
# calls FILE^DIE; tests can pass an explicit `capture^*TST` filer to
# stub the file-write and just record the request.
# Replace these example rows with seeds for your package's tests.
